comment: Tag poses expressed in the Leksell frame coordinate system. Axes: x=0 right (tag 1) → x=200mm left (tag 0); y=0 posterior → y=200mm anterior; z=0 superior/out-of-tags → z=200mm at tag plane. Midpoint between both tags = (100, 100, 200) mm. NOTE: tx_m values are initial defaults only — the app measures the actual inter-tag distance from solvePnP at runtime (both tags must be visible simultaneously for the first calibration). ty_m, tz_m and ry_rad are the physically fixed constants.

tags.name: left
tags.comment: Tag 0 is on the left side. tx_m is an initial default (overridden at runtime). Rotation ry=pi aligns the tag's local axes with the Leksell axes (x and z are flipped relative to the tag's outward-normal convention).

tags.name: right
tags.comment: Tag 1 is on the right side. tx_m is an initial default (overridden at runtime).
